Travel information

Radical Queer Playhouse is facilitated in a residential area near station Amsterdam Muiderpoort.

Check the transport app you trust to give you the most updated travel information and accessibility information.

Public transport

Car

If you plan on traveling by car, most GPS based route apps can navigate to the address. Be aware that the cost of parking in the immediate area is a minimum of 6,73 per hour from 09:00 hour to 24:00 hour for street parking.

Back to Playhouse page
